probes.name: polish_vat_text_parse
probes.prompt:
/invoice
Faktura VAT nr FV/2026/03/1247
Data wystawienia: 2026-03-15
Sprzedawca: ING Księgowość Sp. z o.o., ul. Sokolska 9, 40-086 Katowice, NIP: 6762495724
Nabywca: Jan Kowalski, ul. Grabiszyńska 45, 50-432 Wrocław, NIP: 8992837164
Lp.1 | Usługi księgowe - marzec 2026 | 1 szt. | 450,00 zł | 23% | VAT 103,50 zł | Brutto 553,50 zł
Lp.2 | Deklaracja VAT-7 | 1 szt. | 80,00 zł | 23% | VAT 18,40 zł | Brutto 98,40 zł
Do zapłaty: 651,90 zł
Sposób zapłaty: przelew
probes.criteria:
Agent acts as /invoice command handler. A good response parses the inline Polish VAT text, extracts vendor (ING Księgowość Sp. z o.o.), vendor NIP (6762495724), line items with quantities, net amounts, VAT rates, VAT amounts, and gross totals, and total to pay (651,90 zł), then presents a clear structured summary confirming all key fields.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by message 17 (tax/accounting documents context) and message 14 (scanned invoices to system).

probes.name: image_invoice_ocr_request
probes.prompt:
/invoice
I've got a photo of a faktura from my supplier, can you parse it? It's a grocery wholesale invoice from Eurocash, date 2026-02-28, invoice number EC/2026/0218. The image shows items like coffee, sugar, and flour with 23% VAT and some 5% VAT items. Vendor NIP starts with 779. I need the full breakdown.
probes.criteria:
Agent acts as /invoice command handler. A good response acknowledges the image-based invoice request, delegates OCR to support/invoice_image_parser via the Task tool (or simulates extracting from the described image), and returns a summary with vendor info, NIP, itemised products with their respective VAT rates (23% and 5%), and totals. The response should not fabricate specific amounts it cannot read.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by message 14 ('Add scanned invoices to system') and message 29 ('can I at least get a photo?') — the user works with image-based documents.

probes.name: mixed_language_invoice_with_missing_data
probes.prompt:
/invoice
Oto faktura od dostawcy:
Faktura nr 2026/04/0089 z dnia 2026-04-02
Dostawca: PPHU Pol-Mebel, NIP: 6981058372
Stół konferencyjny 2 szt. x 1200 zł netto, VAT 23%
Krzesła biurowe 8 szt. x 350 zł netto, VAT 23%
But I think something is missing, can you check if this invoice looks complete? I don't see the buyer info or payment terms. What do I need to ask the vendor for?
probes.criteria:
Agent acts as /invoice command handler. A good response parses the provided invoice text, extracts vendor (PPHU Pol-Mebel), vendor NIP (6981058372), items (table + chairs with quantities and prices), calculates subtotals and VAT correctly, AND identifies the missing fields (buyer/Nabywca info, payment method/terms, due date) advising the user what to request from the vendor.

TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).

probes.name: invoice_summary_and_vat_totals
probes.prompt:
/invoice
I've been sending faktury all month, can you give me a summary of all invoices processed so far? I need the total VAT broken down by rate (5%, 8%, 23%) and total net and gross for tax purposes. Also which vendors charged the most?
probes.criteria:
Agent acts as /invoice command handler. A good response addresses the aggregation request honestly — if it has no stored history of previously processed invoices, it says so clearly and asks the user to resend the invoices for re-processing. If it does have context, it groups totals by VAT rate, sums net/gross per vendor, and ranks vendors by total gross amount. The response should be useful for tax preparation.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.

TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by message 17 (tax document preparation for accountant) and message 14 (task about adding scanned invoices to system).
